messages.text: A wave of cleansing light washes through you, burning away affliction and knitting your hurts.
A wave of cleansing light washes over {name}, burning away affliction.
The cleansing light lingers, mending a little more of your hurt.
The cleansing light fades, its work done.
The cleansing light around {name} fades away.
{name} is haloed in a fading wash of cleansing light.
